hero_subtitle: SFTY helps compliance teams connect multi-provider blockchain analytics into structured workflows that preserve evidence and streamline risk review across wallets and transactions.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling

trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance slows when provider outputs separate
problem_description: Blockchain analytics and wallet risk data often stay isolated within different dashboards and tools, forcing compliance teams to manually reconcile results. This fragmentation creates gaps that slow reviews, weaken audit evidence and reduce operational efficiency for VASPs.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects blockchain analytics, wallet risk signals and compliance provider results into one operational workflow that routes reviews, preserves audit evidence and accelerates case management for VASP teams.
workflow_title: Provider outputs flow into case decisions
workflow_description: SFTY connects provider outputs from KYC, KYT and Travel Rule into a structured workflow of reviews, cases, decisions and preserved evidence.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond isolated dashboards. One workflow layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented blockchain analytics and provider outputs into unified workflows, cases, decisions and audit-ready evidence without replacing existing compliance tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASP operations by unifying multi-provider outputs into audit-ready evidence and controlled workflows for bank due diligence and enterprise deployment.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how blockchain risk signals route into case management

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP teams a connected workflow that connects KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and blockchain analytics outputs into structured cases, reviews, evidence and reports.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect provider outputs?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and routes outputs from multiple providers into one operational workflow, applying internal policies and triggering case creation, decision logs and alert triage across compliance functions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves detailed decision logs, case history and linked evidence packages to support audit readiness and defensible internal and external compliance reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY integrates with existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and blockchain analytics providers without replacing them, layering over your current compliance systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace existing compliance providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but connects their outputs into structured, auditable workflows to reduce manual work and improve compliance visibility.
final_title: Connect blockchain analytics into controlled workflows
final_description: Explore how SFTY turns multi-provider analytics outputs into structured cases, evidence and audit-ready compliance workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
